footer.tagline: Conectados pela tecnologia, expandidos pela criatividade.
footer.description: Um coletivo tecnológico que cria valor diverso.

blog.blogCtaHeading: Quer saber mais sobre nossos serviços?
blog.blogCtaBody: Oferecemos suporte abrangente em desenvolvimento de sistemas, design web, design gráfico e educação em TI.
blog.rssDescription: Informações técnicas e relatórios sobre desenvolvimento de sistemas, design web, operações de servidores e educação em TI
blog.indexDescription: The Acecore blog. Tech insights, reports, and news on system development, web design, server operations, and IT education.
blog.pageDescription: Acecore blog article list (page {current} of {total}). Tech insights and activity reports on system development, web design, server operations, and IT education.

meta.siteTitle: Acecore | Desenvolvimento de sistemas, design web e educação em TI
meta.defaultDescription: Acecore é um coletivo tecnológico que oferece desenvolvimento de sistemas, design web, operações de servidores, design e educação em TI como solução integrada.

home.heroTitle: Do desenvolvimento ao design e educação. Suporte de TI completo.
home.heroSubtitle: Desenvolvimento de sistemas, design web, operações de servidores, design e educação em TI — tudo em um único ponto de contato.
home.heroImgTeam: Equipe trabalhando em espaço de coworking
home.heroImgCollaboration: Colaboração da equipe em um projeto
home.servicesLead: Não sabe por onde começar? Atendemos com flexibilidade tanto pessoas físicas quanto empresas.
home.serviceSystemDesc: Resolvemos desafios como otimização de operações e melhoria de gestão de dados com sistemas otimizados.
home.serviceServerDesc: Ambientes de servidor confiáveis e rápidos com histórico comprovado em centenas de conexões simultâneas.
home.serviceWebDesc: Sites projetados para experiência do usuário e geração de leads. Manutenção pós-lançamento incluída.
home.serviceDesignDesc: Logos, cartões de visita, banners, personagens — damos forma visível à sua mensagem.
home.serviceSchoolsDesc: Tutoria personalizada para todas as idades — programação, suporte acadêmico e preparação para equivalência.
home.serviceAceserverDesc: Um servidor público gratuito de Minecraft. Suporta Java e Bedrock com uma comunidade ativa.
home.layersTitle: Quatro camadas que a Acecore suporta
home.layersDescription: Tratamos tecnologia, operações, expressão e educação como uma linha de suporte unificada.
home.layerDesignDesc: Transformamos desafios de negócios em requisitos, construindo sistemas com implementação e operação em mente.
home.layerInfraDesc: Construímos ambientes resilientes e ciclos de melhoria baseados em experiência operacional.
home.layerExpressionDesc: Abordamos design como organização de informação e design de experiência.
home.layerEducationDesc: Transformamos conhecimento prático em suporte educacional para comunidades e próximas gerações.
home.aboutBody1: Organizamos regularmente grupos de estudo e workshops, promovendo uma comunidade de aprendizado.
home.aboutBody2: Através da contribuição open-source, colaboração regional e iniciativas de {link}, construímos parcerias.

notFound.title: Página não encontrada

notFound.heading: Página não encontrada
notFound.body: A página pode ter sido movida ou excluída.
notFound.searchHint: Verifique a URL ou pesquise abaixo.

contact.formSuccess: Sua consulta foi enviada. Verifique seu e-mail de confirmação.
contact.formError: Falha no envio. Tente novamente mais tarde ou entre em contato por e-mail ou telefone.
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Acecore here. Feel free to reach out with questions about our services, estimates, partnership inquiries, and more.
contact.heroSubtitle: Questions, consultations, and requests — start here
contact.formSubmitNote: You will receive a confirmation email after submission. If you don't receive it, please check your spam folder.
contact.methodLineDesc: Feel free to contact us via LINE
contact.methodXDesc: We also accept inquiries via DM

robotProgramming.minecraftCourseDesc: Aprenda os fundamentos da programação no mundo do Minecraft. Desenvolva o raciocínio lógico através da aprendizagem lúdica.
robotProgramming.title: Robot / Programming
robotProgramming.desc: We offer cutting-edge robot programming classes. Students can learn programming fundamentals using actual robots.
robotProgramming.robotCourseDesc: Learn the joy of making and basic mechanisms through hands-on robot building using kits like the Tamiya craft series.
robotProgramming.robotProgCourseDesc: Learn to control robots with programming. Develop logical thinking through sensor and motor control.
robotProgramming.mcProgCourseDesc: Learn programming basics using the popular game Minecraft. Naturally develop computational thinking while having fun.

practicalProgramming.title: Practical Programming
practicalProgramming.desc: We offer a curriculum for learning programming skills used in actual business environments. Gain practical skills to hit the ground running.
practicalProgramming.content1: Web frontend development with HTML / CSS / JavaScript
practicalProgramming.content3: Database design, API development, and cloud utilization

pcSmartphone.title: PC / Smartphone
pcSmartphone.desc: Learn computer and smartphone skills needed for daily life and business. We offer classes for all levels, from beginners to advanced users.
pcSmartphone.level1: Basic PC and smartphone operation (beginners welcome)
pcSmartphone.level3: Email, SNS, and online meeting setup and usage

schools.title: Acecore Schools
schools.description: Acecore Schools is an IT school offering a wide range of educational programs including tutoring, robot programming, practical programming, PC/smartphone classes, and high school equivalency exam preparation.
schools.learningFlowTitle: See the Acecore Schools learning journey
schools.learningFlowDesc: From initial interest to practice and continuity — presented as a single learning path.
schools.flowDiscoverDesc: Through tutoring and robot experiences, we help find each student's entry point to learning.
schools.flowPracticeDesc: Connect experience and understanding through hands-on work with robots, Minecraft, and coding exercises.
schools.flowApplyDesc: Elevate learning to real-world problem solving through web development and tool utilization.
schools.flowContinueDesc: Create a continuity path that fits each student, including exams, certifications, and everyday IT use.
schools.intro: We provide personalized instruction tailored to each student's goals and pace, from children to adults. You can also see where we fit in our services overview.

juku.title: Tutoring
juku.desc: Our tutoring program provides personalized instruction tailored to each student, building academic skills from fundamentals to advanced applications. Experienced instructors support every student's growth.
juku.feature1: Personalized lessons tailored to each student's level of understanding
juku.feature2: Step-by-step support from foundational skills to advanced application
juku.feature3: Test prep and entrance exam preparation available
juku.imgAlt: Individual tutoring session in a classroom

schools.compareBefore2: No one to consult when stuck
schools.compareBefore4: Can't see the connection to practice
schools.compareAfter4: Directly connected to exams, certifications, and real work

ged.title: High School Equivalency
ged.desc: We offer preparation classes for the high school equivalency exam for those who haven't graduated high school. We support you in gaining the knowledge and qualifications needed.
ged.support1: Subject-specific exam preparation (Japanese, math, English, social studies, science)
ged.support2: Personalized study plans based on individual academic level
ged.support3: Practice exams and past paper exercises for practical preparation

schools.ctaBody: For course details and enrollment, contact us by phone, email, or LINE. Feel free to ask even if you're not sure which course is right.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Acecore's mission, philosophy, and activities. We drive development, education, and community engagement through the synergy of technology and creativity.
about.heroSubtitle: What Acecore strives for and values
about.missionLoopDesc: A visual breakdown of how Acecore creates and expands value.
about.cycleImplementDesc: We build operational foundations through system development and server operations.
about.cycleExpressDesc: We deliver compelling experiences through web design and creative work.
about.cycleNurtureDesc: We foster new participants and learning through community and educational activities.
about.cycleReturnDesc: We channel insights back into development and support, strengthening all activities.
about.philosophyBody1: Acecore is a technology collective that creates diverse value through the power of technology and creativity. We provide system development, website design, server operations, design, and IT education as a one-stop solution, serving a wide range of clients from individuals to businesses.
about.philosophyBody2: Our mission is to connect people through technology and expand possibilities through creativity. We value not just providing technology, but growing together with our clients and community to create sustainable value.
about.activity3: Collaborative teaching with regional educational institutions
about.communityDesc: Under the themes of connection, discovery, and co-creation, we regularly hold tech study groups and workshops. We provide a space where participants inspire each other and new ideas are born. Activity reports are also shared on our blog.
about.ossDesc: We actively promote the use and contribution to open-source software and the tech community. Some of our internally developed tools and libraries are published on GitHub.
about.regionalDesc: We collaborate with regional educational institutions and businesses to promote IT adoption and develop digital talent. Our teaching at Acecore Schools is part of this effort.
about.partnershipDesc: We welcome project collaborations and business partnerships. We can cooperate across a wide range of fields including technology, design, and education.
about.linkAceserverDesc: The official site for our free public Minecraft server.
about.linkXDesc: Stay updated with the latest Acecore news.
about.linkGithubDesc: Our open-source projects are published here.
about.linkDiscordDesc: The Discord server where the Aceserver community is active.
about.ctaHeading: Take the next step with Acecore
about.ctaBody: We're always open to service inquiries and partnership proposals.

services.title: Services
services.description: Explore Acecore's comprehensive services including system development, website design, server operations, design, and IT education.
services.heroSubtitle: Diverse IT solutions delivered as a one-stop service
services.serviceMapDesc: Development, operations, communication, and education are designed as a continuous support line.
services.mapDevDesc: We design and implement business systems and apps to fit your operational workflow.
services.mapInfraDesc: We provide stable cloud and server operations, including monitoring and maintenance.
services.mapPublishDesc: We organize and deliver your message through website and design production.
services.mapEducationDesc: We connect education and mentoring so your team can independently operate the technology we introduce.

systemDev.title: Business System & App Development
systemDev.desc: We develop systems and applications tailored to your challenges — from operational efficiency and automation to data management. We handle everything from small internal tools to large-scale web services. Feel free to consult us even if you're not sure where to start.
systemDev.example1: Business management system, CRM, and ERP design & development
systemDev.example2: Web application, SPA, and mobile app development
systemDev.example3: API design, third-party service integration, and data infrastructure

server.title: Server Setup & Operations
server.desc: We specialize in building and operating secure, stable server environments. Acecore has long-term experience running Aceserver (a public Minecraft server), and we bring that expertise to enterprise clients. We're also happy to discuss server migration and cloud adoption.
server.example1: Cloud server (AWS / Azure / GCP / Cloudflare) design & setup
server.example2: Linux / Windows server operations, monitoring & maintenance
server.example3: Game server and community server setup

web.title: Website Design & Management
web.desc: We handle everything from planning to production and maintenance for corporate sites, portfolios, e-commerce, and community sites. We deliver high-quality sites with the latest technology and SEO best practices.
web.example1: Corporate website and landing page design
web.example2: CMS setup, blog, and media sites
web.example4: SEO optimization, performance tuning, and accessibility improvements

services.timelineStep1Desc: Organize goals and constraints, clarify priorities.
services.timelineStep2Desc: Define required technology, screens, and operational rules.
services.timelineStep3Desc: Implement across development, design, and infrastructure.
services.timelineStep4Desc: Ongoing support including improvement proposals and additional development.

design.title: Design & Creative
design.desc: We handle a wide range of creative production including logo design, print materials, banners, and character design. We value accurately shaping what you want to communicate. Combined with our web design services, we can handle everything from design to publication.
design.example2: Business cards, brochures, posters, and other print materials
design.example3: Web banners and social media creatives

education.title: IT School / Acecore Schools
education.desc: A school where working engineers directly teach practical IT skills. We offer a wide range of educational programs including tutoring, robot programming, practical programming, PC/smartphone classes, and high school equivalency exam preparation — all personalized to each student.
education.course5: High School Equivalency (exam prep & study plans)

aceserver.title: Aceserver (Public Minecraft Server)
aceserver.desc: Aceserver is a free public Minecraft server operated by Acecore. With the philosophy of being 'a place for everyone,' players can join from both Java and Bedrock editions and enjoy multiplayer in a vanilla-like environment. With a proven track record supporting hundreds of simultaneous connections, the infrastructure expertise gained here is also applied to our enterprise services.
aceserver.feature1: Free to join for everyone (just need an account)
aceserver.feature4: Active Discord community for interaction and information sharing
aceserver.feature5: Streaming and promotion welcome (no application required)

acestudio.title: AceStudio
acestudio.desc: AceStudio is a new service currently being developed by Acecore. As a platform to maximize creative potential, it will support creative activities across design, video, music, development, and more.
acestudio.area2: Multi-domain support: design, video, music, programming
acestudio.area3: Seamless workflow from creation to publication
acestudio.note: Service details will be published once preparations are complete. Follow us on X or our blog for the latest updates.

services.ctaBody: It's OK even if you're not sure what to ask for. Estimates are free.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Acecore's Privacy Policy. Information about personal data handling, advertising, analytics, and disclaimers.
privacy.adBody1: This site (Acecore) uses Google AdSense, a third-party advertising service.
privacy.adBody2: Advertising providers may use cookies to display ads based on user interests.
privacy.adBody3: For details on disabling cookies and about Google AdSense, please see the Google Policies and Terms.
privacy.analyticsBody1: This site may use Google Analytics as an access analytics tool.
privacy.analyticsBody2: Google Analytics uses cookies for traffic data collection, but this data is collected anonymously and does not identify individuals.
privacy.analyticsBody3: You can opt out of this data collection by disabling cookies. Please check your browser settings.
privacy.personalInfoBody: When using our contact form, we may ask for personal information such as your name and email address. Personal information collected will only be used to respond to inquiries and for necessary communications, and will not be used for any other purpose.
privacy.disclosureHeading: Disclosure of Personal Information to Third Parties
privacy.disclosureBody: Personal information collected will not be disclosed to third parties except in the following cases:
privacy.disclosureItem1: When the individual has given consent
privacy.disclosureItem2: When disclosure is required by law
privacy.disclaimerBody: While we strive to provide accurate information on this site, information may become outdated or contain errors. We accept no liability for any damages arising from the information on this site.
privacy.copyrightBody: The copyright of text, images, and other content published on this site belongs to Acecore or their respective rights holders. Unauthorized reproduction or copying is prohibited.
privacy.contactBody: For inquiries regarding this policy, please contact us through the contact page.

acestudio.title: AceStudio
acestudio.description: AceStudio is a creative platform currently in development by Acecore. Details coming soon.
acestudio.studioScopeDesc: A summary of our content, community, and monetization approach for the public site.
acestudio.areaContentDesc: We bring projects to life across video, streaming, design, and development.
acestudio.areaCreatorDesc: We're building systems to support individual creators' publishing and production activities.
acestudio.areaCommunityDesc: We prioritize building spaces where fans and participants can maintain ongoing connections.
acestudio.areaRevenueDesc: We're translating revenue models under consideration into actual operations.
acestudio.comingSoonHeading: A new creative experience, coming soon.
acestudio.comingSoonBody1: AceStudio is a new service currently being developed by Acecore.
acestudio.comingSoonBody2: As a platform to maximize creative potential, it will support creative activities across design, video, music, development, and more.
acestudio.comingSoonBody3: Service details will be published on this page once preparations are complete.
acestudio.pullQuoteText: Don't just create. Deliver, nurture, and keep it moving.
acestudio.faqA1: Currently in preparation. We'll announce the release date on X and our blog once it's decided.
acestudio.faqA2: The pricing structure is currently under consideration. We plan to offer a free tier.
acestudio.faqQ3: What kinds of creative activities are covered?
acestudio.faqA3: We broadly support digital creative activities including design, video, music, and programming.
acestudio.faqQ4: Can I pre-register or make a reservation?
acestudio.faqA4: Pre-registration is not currently available, but following us on X will keep you informed of the latest news.
acestudio.newsBody: Release information and the latest development updates will be shared on Acecore's X account and blog.
acestudio.inquiryText: For inquiries and requests about AceStudio
